docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF GHEZAL RAOUF IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS YASIR WESA. DEFENDANT DENIZ MEKIK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAZET OZCAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAOUF, GHEZAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEKIK, DENIZ OZCAN, HAZET $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,605.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON FEB 04, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO HAZET OZCAN RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAOUF, GHEZAL AS TO DEFENDANT MEKIK, DENIZ
